[ALERT] Cron Job Failure Monitoring fired

Use case: UC-1.1.10 — Cron Job Failure Monitoring

Severity tier: medium (investigative)

Investigate context and correlate with recent changes before escalation.

Failed cron jobs can silently break batch processing, backups, log rotation, and maintenance tasks. Catching failures early prevents cascading issues.

Catalogue link: https://fenre.github.io/splunk-monitoring-use-cases/uc/UC-1.1.10/

Detected at: {timestamp_placeholder}

SPL summary: {spl_summary}
